content:
### Phase 1: Metadata + Repo-Aware Write + Filtered Search

### Phase 2: Dashboard Graphed Document Reader

| Action | File | Responsibility |
|--------|------|---------------|
| Modify | `tools/corvia-dashboard/src/types.ts` | Add `content_role`, `source_origin` to `GraphNode`, `EntryDetail`, `RagSource` |
| Modify | `tools/corvia-dashboard/src/api.ts` | Add `fetchEntryNeighbors()`, update `fetchGraphScope()` with filter params |
| Create | `tools/corvia-dashboard/src/components/DocumentReader.tsx` | Side panel: renders entry content, metadata badges, neighbor cards |
| Create | `tools/corvia-dashboard/src/components/NeighborCards.tsx` | Clickable related entry cards for graph traversal from reader |
| Create | `tools/corvia-dashboard/src/components/GraphControls.tsx` | Depth slider, content_role filter, source_origin filter dropdowns |
| Modify | `tools/corvia-dashboard/src/components/GraphView.tsx` | Refactor: split-panel layout, entry-level graph mode, hover highlight/fade |
| Modify | `repos/corvia/crates/corvia-server/src/dashboard/mod.rs` | New endpoint: `GET /api/dashboard/entries/{entry_id}/neighbors` |


### Phase 3: Intelligence (Reasoner + Docs Check)

| Action | File | Responsibility |
|--------|------|---------------|
| Modify | `repos/corvia/crates/corvia-kernel/src/reasoner.rs:12-28` | Add `MisplacedDoc`, `TemporalContradiction`, `CoverageGap` to `CheckType` |
| Modify | `repos/corvia/crates/corvia-kernel/src/reasoner.rs` | Implement three new check functions |
| Modify | `repos/corvia/crates/corvia-cli/src/main.rs:244-265` | Add `Docs { Check }` subcommand to `WorkspaceCommands` |
| Modify | `tools/corvia-dashboard/src/components/HealthPanel.tsx` | Render new finding types with doc-specific styling |
